name: CLASSIC BLACK HIGH TOP
description: The iconic high top silhouette in timeless black canvas. A staple for any wardrobe, offering durable comfort and classic street style.

name: CLASSIC WHITE LOW TOP
description: Clean, crisp, and ready for summer. The classic white low top features a breathable canvas upper and the signature rubber toe cap.

name: Color Drops Edition
description: Make a statement with our vibrant Color Drops collection. Featuring bold primary colors and premium stitching for a standout look.

name: Platform Elevate
description: Take your style to new heights. The Platform Elevate features a double-stacked rubber sole for added lift and a bold, modern aesthetic.
